---
title: "Choice effects"
description: >
  How to define choice effects?
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Choice effects}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
bibliography: ../inst/REFERENCES.bib
link-citations: yes
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
# library("choicedata")
devtools::load_all() # TODO: remove
```

The choice formula together with the set of choice alternatives determine the choice effects. In the `{choicedata}` package, choice effects are represented as a `choice_effects` S3 object [@Chambers1992].  

## References
